info.description: Enterprise-grade Go boilerplate with REST API, gRPC services, and notification system
info.title: Go-Core API

get.description: Returns current API status information including name, version and uptime
Returns a paginated list of all API keys with sensitive hash stripped. Requires admin role.

delete.description: Revokes an API key by its ID. Requires admin role.

get.description: Returns all audit logs with optional filtering. Requires admin role.
Exports audit logs as a downloadable JSON file. Supports filtering by date range, action and user. Requires admin role.
Returns a paginated list of comments awaiting moderation (admin only)

post.description: Approves a pending comment for publication (admin only)
Rejects a pending comment (admin only)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all blog posts with optional filtering (admin only)
Returns the current blog settings including runtime overrides

put.description: Partially updates blog settings (only provided fields are changed)

get.description: Returns aggregated blog statistics for the admin dashboard
Returns aggregated system statistics including user counts, notification stats, SSE info and system info. Requires admin role.
Returns a paginated list of email logs with optional status filtering. Requires admin role.

post.description: Sends a test email to verify email configuration is working correctly. Requires admin role.
Queues all pending notifications for processing. Requires admin role.
Queues all failed notifications for retry. Requires admin role.

get.description: Returns notification counts grouped by status (pending/sent/failed) and by type. Requires admin role.
Returns a paginated list of all active sessions with token values stripped. Requires admin role.

delete.description: Revokes all active sessions for a specific user. Requires admin role.

post.description: Broadcast a message to all connected users or specific users

get.description: Returns list of active SSE connections with details

delete.description: Forcefully disconnect a specific SSE client

get.description: Returns current SSE connection and broadcast statistics
Returns detailed health status of all system components (database, redis, SSE, email, storage). Requires admin role.
Returns a paginated list of users with optional filtering. Requires admin role.

post.description: Creates a new user account. Requires admin role.
Assigns a role to multiple users at once. Returns 207 Multi-Status on partial failure. Requires admin role.
Updates the status of multiple users at once. Returns 207 Multi-Status on partial failure. Requires admin role.

get.description: Exports all users as a downloadable JSON or CSV file. Requires admin role.
Returns a single user's details with roles. Requires admin role.

put.description: Updates a user's profile fields. Requires admin role.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a user account. Requires admin role. Admin cannot delete themselves.

post.description: Force-disables two-factor authentication for a user. Requires admin role.
Sends a password reset email for the specified user. Requires admin role.
Assigns a role to a user. Requires admin role.

delete.description: Removes a role from a user. Requires admin role.

put.description: Changes a user's status (active/inactive/locked). Requires admin role.

post.description: Unlocks a locked user account and resets failed login attempts. Requires admin role.

get.description: Get all API keys for the authenticated user (includes assigned roles)

post.description: Create a new API key for the authenticated user. Optionally assign roles via role_ids.

201.description: API key created with raw key

delete.description: Revoke an API key by ID (owner only)

get.description: Get all roles assigned to an API key (owner only)

post.description: Assign a role to an API key (owner only)

404.description: API key or role not found

delete.description: Remove a role from an API key (owner only)

post.description: Disable 2FA after verifying a valid TOTP code
Initiate 2FA setup by generating a TOTP secret and QR code URL
Validate TOTP code with the 2FA token received from login to get full access tokens
Verify a TOTP code to complete 2FA setup
Authenticate user with email and password
Invalidate the current session and refresh token
Get a new access token using a refresh token
Register a new user account with email verification
Send a password reset email
Resend the email verification link
Reset password using a reset token

get.description: Check if a password reset token is valid
Verify user email with token from verification email
Returns all blog categories organized as a nested tree

post.description: Creates a new blog category (admin only)

put.description: Updates an existing blog category (admin only)

delete.description: Deletes a blog category (admin only)
Deletes a comment (owner or admin only)

get.description: Returns the blog Atom 1.0 feed
Returns the blog RSS 2.0 feed

post.description: Registers a media file that was uploaded via presigned URL

get.description: Proxies a media file from storage with access control. Published post media is public, draft/archived requires authentication.

post.description: Generates a presigned S3 URL for uploading media to a blog post

delete.description: Deletes a media file from the blog post (owner or admin only)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of published blog posts with optional filtering

post.description: Creates a new blog post as a draft
Creates a minimal empty draft post and returns its ID. Used by the editor for lazy draft creation.

get.description: Returns a list of most popular blog posts based on total engagement
Returns a list of trending blog posts based on recent engagement

put.description: Updates an existing blog post (owner or admin only)

delete.description: Soft-deletes a blog post (owner or admin only)

post.description: Changes a blog post status to archived

get.description: Returns the full blog post data including content JSON for editing (owner or admin only)
Checks whether the authenticated user has liked a blog post

post.description: Toggles a like on a blog post for the authenticated user
Changes a draft blog post status to published

get.description: Returns the revision history of a blog post (owner or admin only)
Returns a specific revision of a blog post (owner or admin only)

post.description: Records a share action on a blog post

get.description: Returns aggregated engagement statistics for a blog post

post.description: Records a view on a blog post with deduplication

get.description: Returns threaded comments for a blog post

post.description: Creates a new comment on a blog post (guests allowed)

get.description: Returns all media files associated with a blog post
Returns a single published blog post by its URL slug
Returns SEO metadata including Open Graph and JSON-LD for a blog post
Returns the blog sitemap XML for search engine indexing
Returns a paginated list of blog tags
Returns the most popular blog tags sorted by post count

post.description: Upload a general file (images, PDFs, text)

400.description: Invalid file or type not allowed

get.description: Returns a time-limited presigned URL for the given storage key. For S3/MinIO private buckets, URLs are cached in Redis and auto-refreshed before expiry.

delete.description: Delete a file by its storage key (only own files)

get.description: Get paginated notifications for the authenticated user

post.description: Admin endpoint to send a notification to a specific user

get.description: Get notification preferences for the authenticated user

put.description: Update notification preferences for the authenticated user

get.description: Establishes an SSE connection for real-time notifications

post.description: Acknowledge that a notification has been received
Subscribe to specific notification channels
Unsubscribe from specific notification channels

put.description: Mark a single notification as read

get.description: Get a list of all permissions with pagination and optional filtering by category

post.description: Create a new permission (admin only)

get.description: Get permission details by UUID

delete.description: Delete a permission (admin only)

post.description: Add a new Casbin policy rule

delete.description: Remove an existing Casbin policy rule

post.description: Add multiple policies at once
Check if a subject has permission to perform an action

get.description: Reload all policies from database

post.description: Add a resource to a resource group

delete.description: Remove a resource from a resource group

get.description: Get all users with a specific role

post.description: Save current policies to database

get.description: Get all permissions for a user in a domain
Get all roles assigned to a user

post.description: Assign a role to a user in a domain

delete.description: Remove a role from a user in a domain

get.description: Get paginated list of roles

post.description: Create a new role (admin only)

get.description: Get role details by UUID

delete.description: Delete a role by ID (admin only)

post.description: Set role inheritance (child inherits from parent)

delete.description: Remove role inheritance relationship

get.description: Get all permissions assigned to a role

post.description: Add a permission to a role (admin only)

delete.description: Remove a permission from a role (admin only)

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of templates with optional filtering by category, type, status, or search query.

parameters.description: Filter by notification type (email, sms, push, etc.)
parameters.name: type

parameters.description: Search in template name and description
parameters.name: search

200.description: List of templates with pagination info

post.description: Creates a new template with variables and language variants. Templates define the structure of notifications with customizable variables (like {{.Username}}, {{.VerificationURL}}) that can be replaced at render time.

400.description: Invalid request body or validation failed

409.description: Template with same name already exists

requestBody.description: Template creation request with name, type, body, and optional variables

post.description: Update multiple templates at once

get.description: Retrieves a hierarchical list of template categories for organizing templates.

post.description: Creates a new category for organizing templates. Categories can be hierarchical (parent-child relationship).

400.description: Invalid request body or validation failed

requestBody.description: Category request with name, description, and optional parent_id

put.description: Updates an existing template category's name and description.

400.description: Invalid category ID or request body

delete.description: Deletes a template category if no templates are using it.

get.description: Export templates in JSON format

post.description: Import templates from JSON

get.description: Retrieves templates sorted by usage count (how many times they've been rendered). Useful for analytics and identifying popular templates.

parameters.description: Number of templates to return (default: 10, max: 50)
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Renders a template by replacing variables with provided values. Variables in templates use {{.VariableName}} syntax (e.g., {{.Username}}, {{.VerificationURL}}). The renderer uses Go template syntax with helper functions like {{.Username | upper}}, {{.Name | capitalize}}, etc. If the template has html_content, the rendered HTML is also returned.
post.summary: Render a template with dynamic variables

200.description: Rendered template with subject, body, and optional html_content

400.description: Template not found or missing required variables

requestBody.description: Template name and data to render. Example: {\

post.description: Creates predefined system templates (user_verification, password_reset, welcome_user, account_locked, two_factor_code). Can be called multiple times - existing templates will not be duplicated. Requires admin privileges.

get.description: Retrieves full template details including variables, language variants, and metadata by UUID.

put.description: Updates template fields like body, subject, and variables. System templates (is_system=true) can be edited but their name is protected. Variables are replaced entirely with new ones if provided.

delete.description: Soft deletes a custom template. System templates (is_system=true) cannot be deleted.

post.description: Creates a copy of an existing template with a new name. The cloned template starts in inactive status. All variables and language variants are also cloned.

parameters.description: Original template UUID to clone from
parameters.name: id

400.description: Invalid template ID or request body

get.description: Retrieves all variables defined for a specific template.

post.description: Creates a new variable for a template. Cannot add variables to system templates.
post.summary: Add a variable to a template

400.description: Invalid template ID or request body

put.description: Updates an existing variable for a template. Cannot modify system template variables.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's audit logs with pagination

post.description: Upload a new avatar image for the authenticated user

200.description: Avatar uploaded with URL and key

400.description: Invalid file or type not allowed

put.description: Changes the authenticated user's password (requires current password)

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile information

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile fields

delete.description: Soft-deletes the authenticated user's account and revokes all sessions

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's active sessions

delete.description: Revokes all active sessions for the authenticated user
Revokes a specific session by ID

html_content.description: Full HTML override for this language
Full HTML document for email rendering
Full HTML override for this language

ApiKey.name: X-API-Key
ApiKey.description: API Key authentication. Pass your API key in the X-API-Key header.
